creator: glen.j.barber@gmail.com
text:
The attached patch removes a broken link [1] in the Acknowledgments section (11.15) of the developers handbook [2].

[1] - http://user.nj.net/~tms/hello.html

[2] - http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/developers-handbook/x86-acknowledgements.html

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
